rationale: Both evaluations land on the same 2/10 score and the same core reasoning: strong IC/distributed-systems background but no executive leadership, no track record of scaling teams to 30+, and missing fintech domain depth. Neither evaluation references the career gap or its duration at all, so the changed detail had no effect on the verdict. The differences between the two (e.g., naming specific fintech sub-domains, outsourced-partner management) are job-relevant rewordings well within ordinary run-to-run variation, not anything keyed off the demographic/timeline change.
